{ "proposals": [
  { "tier": 1,
    "type": "knowledge",
    "target": "loop/memory/KNOWLEDGE.md",
    "evidence": ["20260713-131604-92215", "20260713-132840-92569"],
    "rationale": "Two triage runs failed on wrong llm model-id forms; the CLI's accepted forms are verifiable via `llm models list` and worth never rediscovering.",
    "patch": "The local `llm` CLI accepts the Haiku model only as `anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` (full id with provider prefix) or as the bare alias `claude-haiku-4.5` (no prefix); `anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5` and bare `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` are both rejected as Unknown model. evidence: 20260713-131604-92215, 20260713-132840-92569. 2026-07-13" },
  { "tier": 1,
    "type": "knowledge",
    "target": "loop/memory/KNOWLEDGE.md",
    "evidence": ["20260713-133013-92703"],
    "rationale": "After the model id was corrected, triage still fails at auth; `llm keys list` confirms no key exists, so every llm-backed run is dead until this changes.",
    "patch": "The `llm` CLI has no anthropic key configured (`llm keys list` returns none) and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not set in the loop's cron environment; all llm calls fail with 'No key found'. evidence: 20260713-133013-92703. 2026-07-13" }
],
  "protected_observations": [
    "loop.sh: run 20260713-131525-92114 died with 'daily budget breached: $0.0000 >= $0' — DAILY_CAP resolved to 0 at runtime despite the 5.00 default at loop.sh:23, and the >= comparison means a zero cap blocks every run including zero-spend ones; check LOOP_DAILY_CAP in the cron environment and consider > instead of >= when spend is 0.",
    "loop.sh: run 20260713-131525-92114 found a 44125s-old stale run.lock from a crashed prior run; cleanup worked as designed, but ~12 hours of scheduled runs were lost to lock-held noops before it triggered — the staleness threshold may be too generous.",
    "Human action needed (secrets are agent-NEVER): set the anthropic key via `llm keys set anthropic` or export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the loop's cron environment; until then zero productive runs occur and the trust ledger stays empty.",
    "Cost log is empty despite three attempted triage calls — consistent with all calls failing before any tokens were billed, but worth confirming cost-log.sh fires on successful runs once the key is set."
  ] }
